nodes.name: ast-bridge.js
nodes.summary: Attach structuralAnalysis to each file object. Pure-JS regex — no WASM, no Node.js APIs. Works in all environments. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.

nodes.name: ast-engine-ts.js
nodes.summary: Initialize the tree-sitter WASM parser. Must be called (and awaited) before any parseCode() calls. Safe to call multiple times — no-ops after first. — AST analysis engine. 58 detector/parser functions

nodes.name: ast-project.js
nodes.summary: When provided, initParser() (WASM) is NOT called. The fn must have the same signature as parseCode(code, filename) and return a tree-sitter tree. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.
